title: Use caveman skill. Can you use it? Also search for varun …

messages.content: Use caveman skill. Can you use it? Also search for varun patkar on the web using the wqebiq tools and tell me if it works

Caveman skill: **active**. ✅

---

**Web search ("webiq"):** No such tool exist in my toolkit. Only tools available:
- `graph_search` — search brain nodes
- `read_markdown` — read node content
- `write_brain` — save nodes
- `trash_note` — delete nodes
- `write_config` — edit config/skills

No webiq MCP server configured. Brain search for it return zero results too.

---

**Varun Patkar in brain (from memory):**
- Full name: Varun Anand Patkar
- Role: Data engineer/analyst + software engineer
- Location: Mumbai, India
- Works: MAQ Software (Jul 2023–present, SE1→SE2)
- Edu: BE in IT, SFIT Mumbai (2018–2022), CGPA 9.1
- Past: Sparks Foundation internship, CSI SFIT Chairperson

No live web search possible. Want me to add webiq as MCP server? Need its HTTPS URL.
